nasb.text: Also every contribution pertaining to all the holy gifts of the sons of Israel, which they offer to the priest, shall be his.

esv.text: And every contribution, all the holy donations of the people of Israel, which they bring to the priest, shall be his.

cnv.text: 以色列人的一切聖物中，奉給祭司為舉祭的，都要歸給祭司。

ccb.text: 以色列人带来奉献的一切圣物都要归祭司所有。
